2604.16918.title: Freshness-Aware Prioritized Experience Replay for LLM/VLM Reinforcement Learning
2604.16918.paper_summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has achieved impressive success in post-training Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs), with on-policy algorithms such as PPO, GRPO, and REINFORCE++ serving as the dominant paradigm. However, these methods discard all collected trajectories after a single gradient update, resulting in poor sample efficiency, particularly wasteful for agentic tasks where multi-turn environment interactions are expensive. While Experience Replay drives sample efficiency in classic RL by allowing agents to reuse past trajectories and prioritize informative ones, directly applying Prioritized Experience Replay (PER) to LLMs fails. The rapid policy evolution of billion-parameter models renders stored priorities stale, causing old high-priority trajectories to dominate sampling long after they have become uninformative. We propose Freshness-Aware PER, which addresses this priority staleness problem by augmenting any PER-based priority with a multiplicative exponential age decay grounded in effective sample size analysis. To the best of our knowledge, Freshness-Aware PER is the first work to successfully apply PER to LLM/VLM reinforcement learning. We evaluate on eight multi-step agentic, reasoning, and math competition tasks with 0.5B, 3B, and 7B models. Freshness-Aware PER significantly outperforms on-policy baselines, achieving +46% on NQ Search, +367% on Sokoban, and +133% on VLM FrozenLake, while standard PER without age decay consistently degrades performance. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/Vision-CAIR/Freshness-Aware-PER.
2604.16918.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習（RL）在後訓練的大型語言模型（LLMs）和視覺-語言模型（VLMs）中取得了令人印象深刻的成功，PPO、GRPO 和 REINFORCE++ 等在政策上的算法成為了主導範式。<lb/>然而，這些方法在單次梯度更新後丟棄所有收集到的軌跡，導致樣本效率低下，尤其是在多回合環境互動成本高昂的代理任務中，這種浪費尤為明顯。<lb/>雖然經驗重放通過允許代理重用過去的軌跡並優先考慮信息豐富的軌跡來推動經典 RL 的樣本效率，但直接將優先經驗重放（PER）應用於 LLMs 失敗了。<lb/>十億參數模型的快速政策演變使得存儲的優先級變得過時，導致舊的高優先級軌跡在變得無信息後仍然主導抽樣。<lb/>我們提出了新鮮度感知的 PER，通過在有效樣本大小分析的基礎上，將任何基於 PER 的優先級增強為乘法指數衰減，來解決這一優先級過時問題。<lb/>據我們所知，新鮮度感知的 PER 是第一個成功將 PER 應用於 LLM/VLM 強化學習的工作。<lb/>我們在八個多步代理、推理和數學競賽任務上進行評估，使用 0.5B、3B 和 7B 模型。<lb/>新鮮度感知的 PER 在政策基準上顯著超越，NQ 搜索提高了 +46%，Sokoban 提高了 +367%，VLM FrozenLake 提高了 +133%，而不帶衰減的標準 PER 則持續降低性能。<lb/>我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/Vision-CAIR/Freshness-Aware-PER 上公開獲得。
2604.16918.author: Weiyu Ma et.al.
2604.16918.authors: Weiyu Ma, Yongcheng Zeng, Yan Song, Xinyu Cui, Jian Zhao, Xuhui Liu, Mohamed Elhoseiny
